component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; the application will fail to compile or run due to incompatible bytecode and removed APIs in the Spring framework.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties to 21 for source and target compatibility.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: The Maven compiler plugin will fail to compile Java 21 features (like virtual threads or pattern matching) if the source/target level is set to 11.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from H2 dependency to inherit from Spring Boot BOM.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x manages H2 version; specifying an old version (1.4.199) may cause runtime incompatibilities or dependency resolution conflicts with the managed version.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact coordinates to the new group and artifact ID.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; using it will result in dependency resolution failure or runtime classpath issues with Spring Boot 3.x.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist'.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with EnableMethodSecurity for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent builder API to lambda DSL required by Spring Security 6.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The fluent builder methods (e.g., csrf().disable(), authorizeRequests()) are removed in Spring Security 6; code fails to compile without lambda DSL.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Update imports to use specific mapping annotation instead of generic RequestMapping and RequestMethod.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Import resolution failure: the javax.persistence package does not exist in the Jakarta EE 9+ API provided by Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for more concise string interpolation.
